children.text: Except as otherwise prohibited by law and except in cases in which the integrity of a criminal investigation would be affected, pursuant to the obligation of the United States under Article 7 of the United Nations Educational, Scientific, and Cultural Organization International Convention Against Doping in Sport done at Paris

children.tail: , and ratified by the United States in 2008, the Attorney General, the Secretary of Homeland Security, and the Commissioner of Food and Drugs shall provide to the United States Anti-Doping Agency any relevant information relating to the prevention of the use of performance-enhancing drugs or the prohibition of performance-enhancing methods.

children.text: Pub. L. 117–103, div. Q, title III, § 305
Section was enacted as part of the United States Anti-Doping Agency Reauthorization Act of 2022 and also as part of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2022, and not as part of title VII of
